overall.description: First-person walkthrough of a futuristic waterfront promenade in a video game (Cyberpunk 2077), featuring modern architecture with 'Night City' signage, palm trees, scattered pedestrians, and transition from concrete sidewalk to asphalt road surface during golden hour lighting with long shadows.

agents.ego_description: walking steadily along the waterfront sidewalk passing benches with seated NPCs and palm trees

notable_agents.action: two NPCs sitting on concrete bench, one wearing red beanie
pedestrian in orange jacket walking away from camera

entered.detail: modern curved concrete bench with seated NPCs
tall palm trees lining the center of the promenade
futuristic high-rise building with Night City signage
metal railing separating walkway from water
modern horizontal light bar on tall pole

segments.scene_description: The segment opens on a sunny waterfront promenade with modern concrete benches on the left where NPCs are seated. Palm trees line the center walkway while futuristic glass buildings rise on the right. The camera moves forward at walking pace, passing pedestrians and approaching the palm trees.

events.description: camera passes a pedestrian in a blue coat and red shoes walking toward camera

agents.ego_description: continuing along the promenade, approaching and passing oncoming pedestrians

notable_agents.action: pedestrian in blue coat and red shoes walking directly toward camera
NPC in yellow pants sitting on bench looking at phone

entered.detail: large industrial trash container with debris

segments.scene_description: The camera continues along the waterfront sidewalk, passing a pedestrian in a blue coat walking toward the camera. The palm trees now appear on the left side as the camera advances. A large trash container appears on the right, and the modern buildings draw closer.

scene_state.functional_zone: transition from sidewalk to waterfront road

events.description: camera moves from concrete sidewalk onto the asphalt road surface
camera faces directly into low morning sun causing bright lens flare and glare

agents.ego_description: turning toward and stepping onto the adjacent road while continuing forward

notable_agents.action: NPC in brown jacket sitting on curved bench

entered.detail: multi-lane asphalt road with white lane markings
bright low sun creating intense lens flare and backlighting

segments.scene_description: The camera transitions from the sidewalk onto the asphalt road surface, turning slightly to face the waterfront. As the camera moves onto the road, it faces directly into the low morning sun, creating a bright lens flare. The waterfront railing draws closer on the left while the benches and trash cans fall behind.

events.description: camera passes a group of three pedestrians walking together along the road edge

agents.ego_description: walking along the road edge parallel to the waterfront, passing groups of pedestrians

notable_agents.action: group of three pedestrians walking together toward camera
pedestrian in green jacket walking past camera

entered.detail: raised concrete platform with metal railing overlooking the water
cluster of palm trees along the building edge

segments.scene_description: The camera continues along the waterfront road, moving away from the direct sun glare. A raised waterfront plaza with railing appears on the left, while palm trees line the right side near the buildings. The camera passes several pedestrians walking in the opposite direction, including a group of three, before the buildings recede into the distance.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous forward movement along a sunny waterfront promenade that shifts from an open pedestrian area toward a more enclosed urban corridor. It begins by gliding past modern concrete benches where NPCs are seated, moving toward a line of palm trees and towering glass buildings under a bright sky. As the camera advances at a walking pace, the perspective shifts so that the palm trees transition to the left side of the frame while a pedestrian in a blue coat passes by. The scene then draws closer to the futuristic architecture on the right, passing a large trash container as the urban environment becomes more immediate.

The shot follows a continuous camera movement from a pedestrian sidewalk onto a waterfront road, transitioning from a blinding solar glare to a clear view of a futuristic promenade. It begins as the camera moves onto the asphalt surface and turns toward the water, facing directly into the low morning sun which creates a bright lens flare. As the camera advances, the glare recedes and the perspective shifts, bringing a raised waterfront plaza and railing into view on the left while benches and trash cans fall behind. The scene then expands along the road, passing palm trees and several pedestrians walking in the opposite direction. Finally, the camera continues its forward momentum as the surrounding buildings gradually recede into the distance under the golden hour light.
